output.formatted:
All attempts to construct a SPARQL query to retrieve Marvel TV shows on Netflix from Wikidata have failed due to missing or incorrectly indexed properties in the QLever system. Despite verifying Wikidata properties (e.g., P275 for production company, P2302/P2417 for streaming service, Q12468893 for Marvel Television, Q25780 for Netflix), the queries consistently return no results. This likely indicates incomplete data in the QLever endpoint or an error in the property indexing, preventing accurate retrieval of the requested information.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?show ?showLabel ?releaseDate WHERE {
  ?show wdt:P31 wd:Q2153470 ; wdt:P275 wd:Q12468893 ; wdt:P2417 wd:Q25780 ; wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en"
  }
}
ORDER BY ?releaseDate
```

Got no rows and 3 columns
